records.question: Which suppliers at 9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753 with other company details exactly Kiribati have maintenance contracts that started on or before 2017-05-14 11:57:50 and ended on or after 2018-03-23 17:29:21, and also supply assets where the asset details are monitor1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50' AND assets.asset_details = 'monitor1' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1
INNER JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2
  ON T1.company_id = T2.maintenance_contract_company_id
INNER JOIN Assets AS T3
  ON T2.maintenance_contract_id = T3.maintenance_contract_id
WHERE
  T1.company_address = '9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753' AND T1.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND T2.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50' AND T2.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21' AND T3.asset_details = 'monitor1'

records.question: Which McDermott Group companies located at 873 Conrad Creek Apt. 286 in China have assets made by FR with model 20 tl that were acquired on 2017-09-19 16:15:45 and disposed on or after 2018-03-06 20:36:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE assets.asset_model = '20 tl' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '873 Conrad Creek Apt. 286' AND assets.asset_acquired_date = '2017-09-19 16:15:45' AND third_party_companies.company_name = 'McDermott Group' AND assets.asset_disposed_date >= '2018-03-06 20:36:14' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'China' AND assets.asset_make = 'FR'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Assets AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.supplier_company_id WHERE T1.company_name LIKE 'McDermott Group%' AND T1.company_address = '873 Conrad Creek Apt. 286' AND T1.other_company_details LIKE '%China%' AND T2.asset_make = 'FR' AND T2.asset_model = '20 tl' AND T2.asset_acquired_date = '2017-09-19 16:15:45' AND T2.asset_disposed_date >= '2018-03-06 20:36:14'

records.question: Which third party companies are supplying assets with the asset model 20 tl?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE assets.asset_model = '20 tl'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Assets AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.supplier_company_id WHERE T2.asset_model = '20 tl'

records.question: Which third-party companies supply assets that are exactly machine1 made by RU and have maintenance contracts ending on or after 2018-02-27 05:03:22?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE assets.asset_details = 'machine1' AND assets.asset_make = 'RU' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-02-27 05:03:22'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Assets AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.supplier_company_id INNER JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T3 ON T2.maintenance_contract_id = T3.maintenance_contract_id WHERE T2.asset_model = 'machine1' AND T2.asset_make = 'RU' AND T3.contract_end_date >= '2018-02-27 05:03:22'

records.question: Which third party companies are located at 016 Kaitlyn Fall Suite 236 with other company details exactly Egypt that supplied assets model 94 kg acquired on or before 2017-10-24 04:29:17, disposed on or before 2018-02-28 18:14:13, and having maintenance contracts starting on or before 2017-05-14 11:57:50?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON assets.maintenance_contract_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_id
WHERE assets.asset_model = '94 kg' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50' AND assets.asset_acquired_date <= '2017-10-24 04:29:17' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '016 Kaitlyn Fall Suite 236' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Egypt' AND assets.asset_disposed_date <= '2018-02-28 18:14:13'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TPC.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS TPC JOIN Assets AS A ON TPC.company_id = A.supplier_company_id JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS MC ON A.maintenance_contract_id = MC.maintenance_contract_id WHERE TPC.company_address = '016 Kaitlyn Fall Suite 236' AND TPC.other_company_details = 'Egypt' AND A.asset_model = '94 kg' AND A.asset_acquired_date <= '2017-10-24 04:29:17' AND A.asset_disposed_date <= '2018-02-28 18:14:13' AND MC.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50'

records.question: Which suppliers from Kiribati have maintenance contracts and also supply assets?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.maintenance_contract_company_id INNER JOIN Assets AS T3 ON T1.company_id = T3.supplier_company_id WHERE T1.company_address LIKE '%Kiribati%'
